modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Team not appearing as Microsoft 365 Group in Outlook.

full_description_text: The user is experiencing an issue where their Team is not visible as a Microsoft 365 Group in Outlook. This situation arose during their attempt to access group functionalities within the application. They are uncertain if there is a specific setting or configuration that needs to be adjusted to resolve this visibility problem.
short_description: Team not appearing as Microsoft 365 Group in Outlook.
description: The user is experiencing an issue where their Team is not visible as a Microsoft 365 Group in Outlook. This situation arose during their attempt to access group functionalities within the application. They are uncertain if there is a specific setting or configuration that needs to be adjusted to resolve this visibility problem.
